channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: FBI: Russian hackers now target Signal backup recovery keys
item.description: The FBI and CISA are warning that a phishing campaign targeting Signal users tied to Russian intelligence services has evolved to steal Signal Backup Recovery Keys, allowing attackers to access victim...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.description: On-chain analysis reportedly found limited holdings of major assets, raising concerns about the exchange's liquidity....

item.dc:creator: CryptoSlate

item.title: Russian Hackers Behind the $2.5 Billion Jaguar Land Rover Cyberattack, Investigators Say

item.title: New Linux pedit COW Exploit Enables Root Access by Poisoning Cached Binaries
item.description:
A flaw in the Linux kernel's traffic-control subsystem can let a local unprivileged user gain root on affected systems.
CVE-2026-46331, nicknamed "pedit COW," is an out-of-bounds write in the packet-...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.description:
It’s dumb out there again.

item.title: Webinar: Why account takeovers remain one of the hardest threats to stop
item.description: Account takeover attacks continue to challenge security teams because attackers often operate through legitimate accounts and trusted services. This webinar explores how behavioral AI can help organiz...

item.title: Ukraine’s National Postal Service Ukrposhta Hacked Overnight
item.description: Kyiv Post reports: Ukrposhta, Ukraine’s national postal service, announced system malfunctions following a cyberattack overnight going into Thursday. In a brief update, the state-run postal service sa...
